patterns.component_pattern: Components in components/analytics/ use inline styles matching existing analytics components (border: 1px solid #e5e7eb, border-radius: 0.375rem, padding: 1rem, white bg). No Tailwind class usage in analytics components — all inline style pattern.
patterns.ssr_guard_pattern: All analytics functions check: (1) typeof window === 'undefined' for SSR, (2) navigator.doNotTrack === '1' for DNT. Functions return { success: false, error: '...' } on guard failure.
patterns.vitest_pattern: Tests use vitest globals (describe/it/expect with globals:true). Mock with vi.mock(). happy-dom environment. Component tests in lib/__tests__/*.test.tsx (vitest.config.ts include pattern).
patterns.tsconfig_pattern: tsconfig.json with path alias @ -> . (project root). @vercel/analytics and web-vitals types resolve from node_modules automatically.

existing_implementations.description: Vercel Analytics is mostly implemented: @vercel/analytics and web-vitals packages installed, AnalyticsInit component exists (not yet calling trackWebVitals), 6 typed track* functions in lib/analytics/events.ts, web-vitals.ts with LCP/INP/CLS tracking, lib/analytics/reporting.ts with Slack/Discord webhooks, analytics-performance-panel.tsx and core-web-vitals-card.tsx UI components exist but not wired into admin page.
